extraction.one_line_summary: KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren won atop Curyat after catching solo attacker DE PLUS Laurens in the final meters for his first professional victory
tactical_patterns: DE PLUS launched late solo move on Curyat climb but lacked power reserves to hold off stronger finishers at line
KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren timed his chase perfectly, conserving energy behind DE PLUS before overpowering him at summit

rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: neutral: showed aggression with late solo attempt on Curyat but couldn't sustain effort to line against stronger finisher
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: positive: exploited DE PLUS's premature move, demonstrated superior finish speed and tactical patience for breakthrough win
